title: Transprotwo
description: Transport over short distance without cables.
body:
Transprotwo is a based on [**Transprot**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/transprot "Transprot") by [**KidsDontPlay**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/kidsdontplay/followers) which hasn't received an update in a while. Transprot is licensed **GNU GPL V3** which allows modification/distribution as long as source is disclosed and the license stays the same.

This mod adds 3 type of Dispatchers:

-   **Dispatcher :** A dispatcher which transports items wirelessly
-   **Dispatcher (fluid) :** A dispatcher which transports liquid wirelessly
-   **Dispatcher (power) :** A dispatcher which transports power wirelessly

To transport you first have to link the dispatcher to the block(s) you want to transfer into using the **Linker** item.

To do so you hold the Linker and Shift Right-click the Dispatcher and then click on the block you want it to link to. (repeat until you've linked all the blocks you've wanted it linked to)

The Dispatcher can be upgraded by inserting one of the 4 available upgrades. Each of these provides a speed and stacksize boost.

If you use a III upgrade or higher it will transfer through blocks.
